Presse

One

Fränkischer Tag
12.12.2018

A wonderful serenity has taken possession of my entire soul.

One

Fränkischer Tag 
12.12.2018

So absorbed in the exquisite sense of mere tranquil existence.

One

Fränkischer Tag 
12.12.2018

I should be incapable of drawing a single stroke.
